description: Implement delivery partner workflow in Flutter: FCM push with end-to-end assignment alerts, fallback polling/reconciliation, foreground alarm, acknowledgment, GPS tracking, deep links, and the complete delivery lifecycle (pickup, damage, collection, OTP completion). Include comprehensive tests.
steps: Add Flutter FCM dependencies to pubspec.yaml: firebase_core, firebase_messaging, flutter_local_notifications, audioplayers (for alarm audio), geolocator, permission_handler.

Create FCM setup: lib/core/firebase/firebase_options_dev.dart and firebase_options_prod.dart as placeholder config files (DefaultFirebaseOptions with dummy values, clearly commented as needing replacement). lib/core/firebase/fcm_service.dart that initializes Firebase, requests notification permission, gets FCM token, registers token via /api/mobile/v1/devices POST, handles token refresh (re-registers automatically).

Create assignment alert system: lib/features/delivery/data/assignment_repository.dart - fetches pending assignments from /api/mobile/v1/assignments GET, acknowledges via POST. Reconciliation logic: on app startup, resume (AppLifecycleState.resumed), login, network recovery, and periodic (every 30s while foregrounded) - fetches pending assignments and triggers alarm for any unacknowledged ones. Uses a local Set of active eventIds to prevent duplicate alarms.

Create foreground alarm: lib/features/delivery/presentation/assignment_alarm_screen.dart - full-screen overlay showing order details (orderNumber, customerName, address, total). Plays looping alarm audio every 3 seconds using audioplayers. Shows until user taps 'Dismiss' or 'View Order'. Manages audio focus correctly (pause/resume with lifecycle). Only one alarm screen active at a time (queue additional assignments). lib/features/delivery/services/alarm_audio_service.dart for audio management.

Create Android notification channel: In the Android manifest and via flutter_local_notifications, create a high-importance channel 'delivery_alerts' with: vibration pattern, sound, full-screen intent support, heads-up notification. In AndroidManifest.xml add: USE_FULL_SCREEN_INTENT permission, SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM (API 31+), REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS. Add the full-screen activity declaration. Document Play Store policy: full-screen intents limited to calling/alarm apps since Android 14 (API 34), degrade to heads-up if denied.

Create iOS notification setup: Request time-sensitive notification authorization (UNAuthorizationOptions.timeSensitive). Document in code comments that iOS does not allow continuous background audio/full-screen takeover like Android - the strongest policy-compliant behavior is: critical/time-sensitive notification + sound + banner. FCM APNs setup instructions in placeholder config.

Create background message handler: In lib/core/firebase/fcm_service.dart, implement onBackgroundMessage handler that: parses the FCM data message (eventId, orderId, orderNumber, assignedAt, deepLink), shows a high-priority local notification on the delivery_alerts channel with full-screen intent (Android) or time-sensitive (iOS). On notification tap, deep-link to the assignment detail.

Create delivery alert setup screen: lib/features/delivery/presentation/alert_setup_screen.dart - first-run screen for delivery partners that: (1) checks and requests notification permission, (2) checks exact alarm / full-screen intent capability (Android), (3) checks battery optimization status and prompts to disable, (4) plays a test alarm sound. After setup, shows an actionable health/status card on the delivery dashboard showing green/yellow/red status for each capability.

Create delivery dashboard: lib/features/delivery/presentation/delivery_dashboard_screen.dart - shows partner name, today's stats (deliveries, cash collected, UPI collected, total lifetime), active orders list, alert health card. Pull-to-refresh updates all data.

Create delivery order flow screens: (a) delivery_order_detail_screen.dart - order info, items, customer address with map link, call button. (b) pickup_confirmation - marks order as picked up via PATCH /api/delivery/orders/[id] with action:'picked_up' (uses mobile auth variant or add mobile auth support to existing endpoint). (c) damage_report_screen.dart - item selector, quantity, reason, reduction amount, evidence photo upload. (d) collection_screen.dart - cash/UPI input, UPI reference, validates against expected amount. (e) completion_screen.dart - OTP input (6 digits) + slide-to-deliver control, calls /api/delivery/complete.

Create GPS tracking service: lib/features/delivery/services/location_service.dart - uses geolocator to watch position only during active delivery (status OUT_FOR_DELIVERY or ARRIVING). Throttles updates to max once per 5 seconds. Posts to /api/delivery/location. Stops immediately when delivery completes or no active orders. Handles background location permission correctly (request only when needed, explain to user why). Never logs precise coordinates.
Implement deep links: Configure GoRouter to handle deep links like msmsupermarket://delivery/order/{id} and msmsupermarket://order/{id}. FCM notification tap should navigate to the correct screen.

Modify existing backend endpoints to support mobile auth: Add authenticateMobileRequest as alternative auth check in /api/delivery/poll, /api/delivery/orders/[id], /api/delivery/complete, /api/delivery/collect, /api/delivery/damage, /api/delivery/location. If Authorization header with Bearer token is present, use mobile auth; otherwise fall back to session auth (preserving web compatibility).

Add comprehensive tests: (a) test/features/delivery/assignment_repository_test.dart - test reconciliation logic, duplicate prevention, idempotent acknowledgment. (b) test/features/delivery/alarm_service_test.dart - test that alarm starts/stops correctly, only one alarm active. (c) test/features/delivery/location_service_test.dart - test throttling, stops when no active delivery. (d) Backend tests: tests/assignment-flow.test.ts - test assignment creates event, reassignment creates new event, unauthorized acknowledgment fails, duplicate acknowledgment succeeds, cold start reconciliation returns pending. (e) test/features/delivery/fcm_service_test.dart - test token registration, refresh handling.
Commit with message 'feat: implement delivery workflow with FCM alerts, alarm, GPS tracking, and deep links'.
acceptance_criteria: FCM service initializes, registers device token, handles token refresh
Assignment events are created on order assignment and available via /api/mobile/v1/assignments
Foreground alarm plays looping audio every 3s and shows full-screen overlay
Only one alarm screen active at a time (no duplicates from repeated polls/pushes)
Background handler shows high-priority notification with full-screen intent (Android)
iOS uses time-sensitive notifications with documented limitations
GPS tracking starts only during active delivery and stops immediately after
Alert setup screen verifies all required permissions
Existing web delivery partner UI continues to work (backend changes are additive)
verification: Run 'cd mobile && flutter analyze' - no errors
Run 'cd mobile && flutter test' - all tests pass
Run 'npm test' - all backend tests pass including new assignment flow tests
Run 'npm run build' - backend builds successfully
